page: Microsoft Azure HB120-96rs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the HBv3 server family. It is equipped with 96 dedicated vCPUs and 456.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.75 GB per vCPU. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration includes 2412 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. It features Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) capabilities, which facilitate low-latency, high-throughput networking across clustered nodes. There are no GPUs bundled with this instance, and it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high core count, dedicated CPU allocation, and RDMA support, this instance is designed for high-performance computing (HPC) workloads, large-scale simulations, and parallel processing tasks. The inclusion of substantial local storage and Premium Storage compatibility also makes it suitable for data-intensive applications and database workloads. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile offers a dense allocation of dedicated compute resources and high-speed networking capabilities relative to its resource class.
description: Microsoft Azure HB120-96rs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance from the HBv3 family, designed for high-performance computing and parallel workloads. Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 456.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.75 GB of RAM per core. The instance is equipped with 2412 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It is RDMA-capable, enabling low-latency, high-bandwidth node communication essential for clustered environments. This server does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The combination of dedicated processing cores, substantial memory, and high-speed networking makes this instance highly suitable for large-scale simulations, computational fluid dynamics, and complex database workloads requiring high resource density and efficient node-to-node communication.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute platform featuring ninety-six cores, high-capacity local storage, and RDMA networking for clustered parallel workloads.
